better known as **Enrique Novi** (born April 21, 1947, in [Mexico City](/wiki/Mexico_City "Mexico City"), [Mexico](/wiki/Mexico "Mexico")), is a Mexican [actor](/wiki/Actor "Actor").[[1]](#cite_note-novi-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)
["Enrique Novi, cambia la actuación por la política"](http://www.eluniversal.com.mx/notas/462716.html) (in Spanish). El Universal México. Retrieved January 31, 2015.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Mexican actor

| Enrique Novi | |
| --- | --- |
| Born | Enrique Rabinovich Pollack   (1947-04-21) April 21, 1947 (age 78)  [Mexico City](/wiki/Mexico_City "Mexico City"), [Mexico](/wiki/Mexico "Mexico") |
| Occupation | Actor |
| Years active | 1970-2011 |

**Enrique Rabinovich Pollack** better known as **Enrique Novi** (born April 21, 1947, in [Mexico City](/wiki/Mexico_City "Mexico City"), [Mexico](/wiki/Mexico "Mexico")), is a Mexican [actor](/wiki/Actor "Actor").[[1]](#cite_note-novi-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)
